name: libcreep
description: A browser-only fingerprinting library based on the Creep.js detection suite

scripts.build: npm run clean && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && rm -rf dist/internal/debug && node scripts/check-production-bundle.mjs
scripts.lint: oxlint --deny-warnings src/index.ts src/internal/debug/profile.ts src/runtime.ts src/types.ts src/worker.ts test/*.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && vitest run --project browser
scripts.test:speed: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.speed.config.ts
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && publint && attw --pack --profile esm-only

author: Networkcats
